expected_visible_relationship: Wheel and tread shading must visibly improve: rim and tread corners should read as hard-edged forms while rubber tire bands read smooth and not faceted.
actual_visible_diagnosis: User cloud review reports no-op churn: the material split, normal settings, and higher ring sampling did not create a meaningful visible delta.
root_cause: The guard proved GLB internals such as material primitives, normal accessors, and sample counts instead of proving a visible lighting/silhouette distinction. It allowed source/asset churn to masquerade as visual progress.
forbidden_next_green: Do not accept another tread shading revision from material names, primitive counts, normal accessors, triangle count, or build tokens. The next guard must require a visible comparison artifact from the accepted cloud/Sense lane showing the rim/tread distinction changed.
visual_acceptance: Cloud/Sense only; local capture is forbidden.
